overall.description: A slow first-person exploration through a heavily foggy industrial yard adjacent to a large red warehouse building with 'KALEVALA' signage. The scene is set in a dense pine forest with low visibility, creating an ominous survival horror atmosphere typical of high-end game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy industrial yard with warehouse and forest perimeter

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward along a dirt path toward an orange traffic cone, cautiously observing the foggy industrial surroundings and dense tree line

entered.detail: large red warehouse structure with 'KALEVALA' signage and corrugated metal lower walls
large closed roll-up metal door on the warehouse facade
wooden pallets and crates stacked on the ground beside the path
single orange and white traffic cone standing in the middle of the dirt path
tall evergreen trees shrouded in heavy fog surrounding the industrial yard

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly forward through a fog-shrouded industrial yard, approaching an orange traffic cone in the path. To the right stands a large red warehouse building with visible 'KALEVALA' signage and a corrugated metal door, while stacked wooden crates sit to the left. Dense pine trees fade into the foggy background, creating an isolated, ominous atmosphere with no other characters or movement present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, steady forward progression through a desolate industrial yard enveloped in a thick, oppressive fog. It begins by gliding through the hazy air, where the silhouettes of dense pine trees fade into a gray void in the background. As the camera advances, the path narrows between stacked wooden crates on the left and a massive red warehouse building on the right, its corrugated metal door and KALEVALA signage emerging from the mist. The movement continues toward a solitary orange traffic cone resting in the path, further emphasizing the isolated and ominous atmosphere of the silent yard.
